roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROB TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY SENT
/CAL:APD 1203,9PC MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION TO SAN MATEO COUNTY/DAWT/MOGRTD/TRANS:SAN MATEO COUNTY FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:APD MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION (RESTITUTION)/CR110 & CR111 FILED/X:THE DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $150 TO SANDRANAILS/ /X:THE DEFENDANT IS TO PAY 10 PERCENT INTEREST FROM THE DATE OF SENTENCING 03-20-17/X:THE DEFENDANT IS TO PAY AN ADMINISTRATIVE FEE NOT TO EXCEED 15 PERCENT OF THE RESTITUTION OWED (PEN, CODE 1203,1(I)/

/AJW/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 5D/CTS:5/X:THE DEFENDANT IS TO BE MONITORED BY THE APD INTENSIVE SUPERVISION UNIT/WS/RESTV/SA1:SANDRA NALLS/SA2:207 SKYLINE BLVD,, SF/VF2:150/PC/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOPC/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANTSTAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:  NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO 12-01-16/X: BAIL SET AT $60,000/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:12-27-16/987,2/ACM/SAORD/SA1:SANDRA NALLS/SA2:207 SKYLINE BLVD, SF CA/SAORD3/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/AMEND:2/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PRELIM HEARING & DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 02-14-17 AND PRELIM HEARING ON 03-02-17/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & BENCH WARRANT STAY/BWSTAY:11-10-16/X:LOVE WAIVER/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
